description_long: This coatrack features a modern, sculptural design with three spherical nodes arranged vertically along a gently curving central stem. The stem rises from a solid, circular base that provides stability. Each sphere is evenly spaced, with the largest at the top, a medium-sized one in the middle, and the smallest near the base. The smooth, continuous curves of the stem give the piece a dynamic, artistic appearance, making it both functional and decorative. The surface appears to be a uniform matte gray, suggesting a metal or painted finish. There are no visible hooks or protrusions, and the overall form is minimalist and contemporary.
description: A modern, sculptural coatrack with three gray spheres on a curving stem and a circular base, featuring a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Curved stem with three spheres visible, showing the dynamic, wavy profile and circular base.
description_view_1: Straight-on view reveals the vertical alignment of the three spheres and the symmetry of the design.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, highlighting the curving stem and staggered placement of the spheres.
description_view_3: Direct front view with all three spheres aligned vertically, emphasizing the straightness of the central axis.
